title: Whimscape x Improved Brewing Guide
description: An easy-to-follow brewing guide for Whimscape!
body:
## 🔎 SIMPLIFY THE TASK OF MAKING POTIONS! 🧪

**► This Resource Pack adds a brewing guide to the "Brewing Stand" UI.** 

**▼ Stylized to fit perfectly with the [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape) Resource Pack!**

![Brewing Stand Whimscape](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcd777d76925a60790e0c28cfe52e7796cbe2433.png)

**⚠︎ Warning: ﻿Will not work if _"Force Unicode Font"_ is enabled**

**■ Works with Vanilla Minecraft, and it shows all the recipes up to date!**

**✦ Inspired by the [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) Brewing Guide.**

**★ Special Thanks to [Kavast](https://modrinth.com/user/kavast) for making Whimscape! ★**
